$:/plugins/byper/code-copy-button/readme.title: $:/plugins/byper/code-copy-button/readme
$:/plugins/byper/code-copy-button/readme.text:
! Code Copy Button Plugin

Automatically adds copy buttons to code blocks in TiddlyWiki.

!! Features

* Adds a copy button to standalone code blocks
* Adds a copy button to inline code (shown on hover)
* Provides feedback after successful copy (green checkmark)
* Uses SVG icons for clarity and aesthetics
* Responsive design that adapts to different themes
* Automatically listens for newly rendered code blocks

!! Usage

After installing the plugin, all code blocks will automatically have copy functionality.

!!! Standalone Code Block Example

```javascript
function hello() {
  console.log("Hello World");
}
```

A copy button icon will appear in the top right corner of the code block.

!!! Inline Code Example

When using inline code like `console.log()` in text, a copy button will appear after the code when you hover over it.

!! Custom Styling

You can override the button appearance in custom styles:

```css
.tc-copy-button {
  background: your-color;
}
```

!! Compatibility

* Requires TiddlyWiki 5.1.22 or higher
* Requires a modern browser that supports the Clipboard API

!! Version History

|!Version|!Date|!Changes|
|1.0.0|2025-11-04|Initial version, supports standalone and inline code block copying|
